latestIgtvVideos.caption:
50 million thanks from the bottom of our hearts ❤️

Since 2007, your purchases of Charity Pot Body Lotion have given $50 million directly to small grassroots groups working on the frontlines for human rights, animal protection and environmental justice.

It's because of #Lushies like you that we've been able to reach this milestone and support 1,850 projects in North America and 950 more around the globe. And there's much more to do.

Help us raise awareness this #GivingTuesday. Keep purchasing and sharing your Charity Pot Body Lotion or the packaging-free version—which now comes in three medallion designs, each honoring one of our three areas of support.

Kindness has never been so needed.
#CharityPot.

Check out these amazing groups
Collectif Montréal en Action: https://montrealenaction.com/
PangeaSeed Foundation: https://www.pangeaseed.foundation/
Ponca Tribe of Oklahoma: http://www.ponca.com/

latestIgtvVideos.caption:
Introducing our first haircare range for curls, coils and textured hair. It was developed at the Lush UK Hair Lab with Sarah Sango, a hairdresser with 19 years' experience. She serves as an R&D stylist and Black haircare specialist and drew on family recipes to create five new products and update a Lush classic. Now you can gently wash your gorgeous hair with SLS-free Avocado Co-wash and choose from two amazing conditioners (Power and Glory) to keep hair both soft and strong. Then spritz on some of our nourishing leave-in, Super Milk, calm your scalp and treat your ends with Renee's Shea Souffle and lock everything in with Curl Power. For fans of Hair Custard, Curl Power offers a little more slip and hold—so it's sure to fill that empty place in your heart and on your bathroom counter. 

Our new haircare collection is online now and will be available for in-store pick up beginning November 30th. Tap to shop or follow your local shop's FB page to be the first to know when it arrives in-store.

Need some help before you twist, twirl, wrap, curl, braid, crochet and play? Chat with one of our friendly shop staff today. Head to our link in bio to book your virtual consult.

Shop the video:
Full Range: https://bit.ly/2GJtQIu
Renee´s Shea Souffle Hair & Scalp Oil: https://bit.ly/3luxQfg

latestIgtvVideos.caption:
by Lush Cosmetics Mini Product Expert, Rome 💛

You know how they say it's better to give than to receive? We all love opening a present packed with our favorite things...but there really is nothing like watching someone else's face light up. Our lil Lushie Rome is here to make your spirits bright with this cute Christmas unboxing video.

We sent him (and his brother Sonny) some of the best vegan Christmas goodies for the bath and beyond to enjoy all season long. You'll spot new arrivals like I Want A Hippopotamus For Christmas Bath Bomb and Elfie Stick Bubble Stick, plus returning faves like Candy Cane Reusable Bubble Bar and Shoot For The Stars Bath Bomb.

Oh, and if you're wondering about those fluffy packing peanuts...not to worry, they're made from biodegradable potato starch. Plus the boxes, inserts, tags and more are made from recycled and recyclable materials so nothing goes to waste.

Don't forget to grab a few of these winter wonders for yourself (or your favorite people) before Santa sets off in his sleigh! 🎅

📹: @sammymontgoms

Need help relaxing and unwinding? Our friends over in the UK have got you covered. 💜

Introducing...our most luxurious invention yet. 

Beauty Sleep Face And Body Mask. Made with the most calming ingredients, plus a dollop of Gorgeous Moisturizer.

This decadent mask is made with calming lemon verbena and valerian root extracted in honey, soothing fresh coconut and a hydrating mullein leaf and linseed decoction to boost your skin's natural glow. The perfect addition to any nighttime routine. It also contains lavender and neroli oils that may help you unwind and relax. 

Catch up on some Beauty Sleep with this extra-indulgent approach to self-care.

#GetYourBeautySleep now online and in-store ➡️ https://bit.ly/3jExgJW 

#LushBeautySleep #BeautySleepFaceAndBodyMask #BeautySleep #Skincare #Selfcare #Fall

by Lush Cosmetics Mini Product Expert, Penelope (@penelop.and.the.p) 🌟🦄

We may not be able to go trick-or-treating this year, but that doesn't mean we can't have any Halloween fun! Our fab lil Lushie Penelope, a self-proclaimed unicorn, bath bomb obsessor and magic-maker, is here to take you through our whole Halloween 2020 collection. These not-so-creepy critters will guarantee vegan and ethical fun for those ghostly nights ahead.

From our most anticipated comeback, Lord Of Misrule Bath Bomb, returning treats like Bewitched Bubble Bar or Punkin Pumpkin Bath Bomb—to some exciting new additions to the family like Bat Art Bath Bomb, Very Very Frightening Shower Gel and Toffee Apple Lip Scrub, this year we're bringing back that much-needed Halloween nostalgia to keep the chill vibe while celebrating from home.

🎥: @iridescentphotography.htx 

Don't forget to put aside a couple of these treats for yourself before they disappear!

latestPosts.caption:
On Black Friday 2021, following the release of the Facebook Files (which revealed how much Meta knew about the very real harms being caused by their platforms and yet were doing nothing about it), Lush signed out of Instagram, Facebook, TikTok and Snapchat until these platforms took action to provide a safer environment for users.
 
Two years on, has Meta cleaned up its act? Sadly but perhaps not surprisingly, no. Deliberately-addictive algorithms are still filling our feeds with harmful content and misinformation to drive engagement. Meanwhile their surveillance-for-profit business model – one that underpins all the 'Big Tech' companies – tracks our every move and sells our data, making them untold billions. 
 
That's why we're campaigning for legislative change that puts the control back in the hands of the people. We've teamed up with People vs Big Tech – a decentralised movement challenging the power and abuses of the Big Tech giants.
 
Introducing The Cloud bath bomb, with 100% of the sales price (minus government taxes) going to People vs Big Tech to fund vital campaigning that takes their message directly to those who hold the power to change the system.
Don't lose your head in the cloud. There's a brighter future ahead.
Hit the link in bio to join the #BigTechRebellion
— 
 
Friendly note: we're not back on Instagram. If you'd like to contact us, our Customer Care team will be happy to help here:
Phone: 1-888-733-5874
SMS: 1-888-733-5874
Email: customercare@lush.com
Live Chat: lush.com & the Lush app
latestPosts.alt:
Trigger warning:
Here’s what Instagram won’t tell you

childPosts.alt:
Trigger warning:
Here’s what Instagram won’t tell you

13.5% of teen girls say Instagram makes thoughts of suicide worse
17% of teen girls say it makes eating disorders worse
– The Facebook Files, September 2021

“We’re now seeing enough data that there’s a danger window, when kids are 10-13 and going through puberty and literally their brains start changing. No-one is going to receive a compliment so sublime or a criticism so severe as what a 12 year old girl receives. And we’re seeing that percolate out into things like suicide rates. By 2030 we will not have any under 12-13 year olds on [social media] platforms.”
– Frances Haugen, Facebook Whistleblower
At Lush House @SXSW March 2023

childPosts.alt: WHAT THE ZUCK
HAPPENED TO YOUR DIGITAL RIGHTS?
From fighting internet shutdowns, to raising awareness of mental health impacts of social media, we’ve been campaigning for digital rights for nearly a decade. Here are some highlights →

2023 
ESC Big Tech
It’s time to take CTRL of your digital rights. On Black Friday we launched The Cloud bath bomb to raise funds for People vs Big Tech—a global movement fighting for a different kind of internet, one free from intrusive surveillance, addiction-algorithms and harmful content.

2023
Digital Divestment Roadmap
At SXSW as part of our Big Tech Rebellion, Lush announced our pledge to reduce spending on Big Tech by a third, reducing our dependence on the tech giants. We believe in the power of small tech energy, and we’re putting our money where our mouth is.

2021
Lush Went Anti-Social
In 2021 the Facebook Files were released, thanks to whistleblower Frances Haugen,  exposing the very real harms being caused on the platform. So on Black Friday we turned our back on Instagram, Facebook, Snapchat, and TikTok, until these platforms took action to provide a safer environment for users.

2020
Digital Detox Day
On 15th September 2020, Lush partnered with IAMWHOLE and Zoe Sugg. Hundreds of thousands of people around the world put their devices down for one day to focus on their mental health. Money raised from sales of our exclusive bath bomb, IRL, went to the Wholeness Fund, which made grants available to grassroots groups focusing on mental health and wellbeing.

2019
Take CTRL
We partnered with Bits of Freedom, a digital rights organisation “focused on privacy and freedom of communication online”. Accompanied by a tote bag with the slogan “Take CTRL”, the action was designed to create awareness and encourage people to make conscious choices in the way they use technology. The proceeds went to Bits of Freedom to support their mission.

2018
What The Zuck
In light of Facebook declaring that 29 million users’ data had been leaked because of a bug, Lush created and sold a limited-edition tote bag at The Next Web 2018 conference with the slogan “What the Zuck?”  Proceeds went into the Lush Digital fund, supporting “tech for good” initiatives globally.

2016
#KeepItOn with Access Now
On Black Friday 2016, Lush websites were “switched off”, confronting users with a fake shutdown and urging them to take action. The worldwide #KeepitOn campaign was designed to raise awareness of the impact of internet shutdowns, and was accompanied by a limited-edition bath bomb called Error 404, which funded Access Now to help keep the internet on around the globe.

Digital Engagement: A Social Future
A study by LUSH X Future Laboratory, 2023

“For too long a small handful of tech CEOs have been allowed to trample on our rights and disrupt our communities, unleashing industrial-scale disinformation, driving hate and polarisation and preying on our vulnerabilities - all to keep us clicking and scrolling while they profit from our data.”
– People vs Big Tech

latestPosts.caption:
On Black Friday 2021, following the release of the Facebook Files (which revealed how much Meta knew about the very real harms being caused by their platforms and yet were doing nothing about it), Lush signed out of Instagram, Facebook, TikTok and Snapchat until these platforms took action to provide a safer environment for users.
 
Two years on, has Meta cleaned up its act? Sadly but perhaps not surprisingly, no. Deliberately-addictive algorithms are still filling our feeds with harmful content and misinformation to drive engagement. Meanwhile their surveillance-for-profit business model – one that underpins all the 'Big Tech' companies – tracks our every move and sells our data, making them untold billions. 
 
That's why we're campaigning for legislative change that puts the control back in the hands of the people. We've teamed up with People vs Big Tech – a decentralised movement challenging the power and abuses of the Big Tech giants.
 
Introducing The Cloud bath bomb, with 100% of the sales price (minus government taxes) going to People vs Big Tech to fund vital campaigning that takes their message directly to those who hold the power to change the system.
Don't lose your head in the cloud. There's a brighter future ahead.
Hit the link in bio to join the #BigTechRebellion
— 
 
Friendly note: we're not back on Instagram. If you'd like to contact us, our Customer Care team will be happy to help here:
Phone: 1-888-733-5874
SMS: 1-888-733-5874
Email: customercare@lush.com
Live Chat: lush.com & the Lush app
